Specification: Full-service import via Open Air Imports or Garden State Imports
Notes: Use a full-service importer (Open Air Imports, Garden State Imports) who handles sourcing, pre-ship inspection, ocean freight, US customs clearance, and port release as a bundled quoted cost. Eliminates guesswork on line items — get a firm quote before committing to a car. East Coast delivery via Baltimore (CSXT RoRo) or Newark. 25-year rule: all E36 convertibles are now fully exempt from EPA/DOT FMVSS compliance.

Specification: Included via full-service importer (Open Air / Garden State)
Notes: Full-service importers typically include or coordinate a pre-ship inspection as part of their service. Confirm with your importer. UK E36 convertibles are notorious for floor/sill rust under the convertible frame reinforcement plates — make sure inspection covers undercarriage and sill boxes.

Specification: OEM BMW E36 Hardtop (sourced with car or separately)
Notes: PREFERRED configuration — prioritize sourcing a car that comes with an OEM hardtop. E36 hardtops are increasingly rare but do come with cars or can be sourced separately ($500-1500 eBay/FB Marketplace). Soft top only needed as a weather backup — condition is secondary concern if hardtop is present.

Specification: Specialty Modified Vehicle Policy (Hagerty / Grundy / American Collectors)
Notes: Standard auto insurance WILL NOT cover an RHD import with engine swaps. Hagerty or Grundy agreed-value specialty policies cover modified/collector cars. Annual premium varies by stated value and usage. Required before the car leaves the port.

$247 verified (GBP 189). PNP replacement for OEM E36 cluster. Displays actual °C numbers for coolant temp (from OEM NTC sensor via existing harness — no new wiring), oil temp, oil pressure (from Bosch PST-F1 via analog inputs). Up to 7 analog 0-5V sensor inputs. Data logging to microSD; WiFi SD access from phone. G-force meter built in. Phase 3 upgrade: switch to MaxxECU CAN bus mode — Gauge.S reads processed data from MaxxECU directly, raw sensor wiring to cluster no longer needed. Install definition file matching ECU type: MS41.x for OBD2 E36, MaxxECU profile from Phase 1 onward. See wiki.sorek.uk before install.

Specification: Bosch PST-F1 + M14x1.5 to M10x1.0 Adapter
Notes: $65 (~GBP 49). Dual oil temp + oil pressure sensor in one unit. Installs at M52/M54 VANOS banjo bolt (M14x1.5). Adapter steps down to M10x1.0 sensor thread. Signal wires route to Gauge.S analog inputs (0-5V). Displays actual oil temp °C and oil pressure bar/psi. At 07K swap: relocate to equivalent oil gallery port on 07K block — same sensor, new mounting location. MaxxECU can also read PST-F1 inputs directly for data logging.
